testcase.name: test_partial_void_validates_qty_range
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_partial_void.py:114: in test_partial_void_validates_qty_range assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200 for valid qty, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200 for valid qty, got 400: {"detail":"Cantidad a anular debe ser entre 1 y 1.0"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_partial_void_creates_audit_log

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected qty 1 in audit log, got 2 assert 2 == 1 + where 2 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb1b8f0804c0>('quantity') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb1b8f0804c0> = {'authorized_by_id': None, 'authorized_by_name': None, 'comments': 'Express partial', 'created_at': '2026-02-28T14:43:45.556301+00:00', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_partial_void.py:151: in test_partial_void_creates_audit_log assert log.get("quantity") == 1, f"Expected qty 1 in audit log, got {log.get('quantity')}" E AssertionError: Expected qty 1 in audit log, got 2 E assert 2 == 1 E + where 2 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb1b8f0804c0>('quantity') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb1b8f0804c0> = {'authorized_by_id': None, 'authorized_by_name': None, 'comments': 'Express partial', 'created_at': '2026-02-28T14:43:45.556301+00:00', ...}.get

testcase.name: test_partial_void_return_to_inventory_flag

skipped.message: No free tables available for testing

testcase.skipped: /app/backend/tests/test_partial_void.py:433: No free tables available for testing
